description:
Sundry is a WinGet local manifest management tool that makes it easier for you to remove manifests, make changes to them, and also aids in updating them.


Fixes 
- fix: correct variable scoping for sundry remove by @DuckDuckStudio 
- fix: update outdate index error hints by @DuckDuckStudio 
- fix: normalize parameter brackets for help output by @DuckDuckStudio
Full Changelog: https://github.com/DuckDuckStudio/Sundry/compare/1.1.2...1.1.3
